full_prompt: Design a machined and welded carbon-steel bracket for a roadside CCTV/lighting mast support, per a representative European infrastructure procurement tender: mount a 30 kg CCTV head + housing on a 6 m pole, survive EN 1991-1-4 Eurocode wind loads, EN 1990 ULS + SLS load combinations, and EN 1090-2 execution class EXC2 fabrication quality. Envelope: 300 x 200 x 120 mm. Interfaces: pole-side 360-degree clamp onto a 76 mm OD pole with two U-bolts M12 class 8.8 through-holes; camera-side M10 x 4 bolt pattern on 120 x 80 mm rectangle. Material: S275JR structural steel per EN 10025-2 (yield 275 MPa, UTS 430 MPa, Young's modulus 210 GPa, Poisson 0.3, density 7850 kg/m^3, elongation 23%). Corrosion protection: hot-dip galvanized per EN ISO 1461, minimum coating thickness 85 um. Load cases per EN 1991-1-4 + EN 1993-1-1: LC1 permanent load (CCTV 30 kg = 294 N down); LC2 wind load Category II terrain, basic wind velocity v_b = 27 m/s (representative EU coastal), design wind pressure q_p(z) = 0.75 kN/m^2 at 6 m height with drag coefficient c_f = 1.0 on camera frontal area 0.2 m^2 = 150 N horizontal, plus wind on bracket itself ~= 30 N; LC3 ULS load combination 1.35*G + 1.5*Q = 1.35*294 + 1.5*180 = 667 N resultant; LC4 SLS load combination 1.0*G + 1.0*Q for deflection check; LC5 hailstone impact 20 mm dia at 30 m/s (EN 61730-2 Class 2 equivalent) = 5 J kinetic, treated as transient if modeled. Pass/fail per EN 1993-1-1 + EN 1993-1-8: (R1) max von Mises under LC3 ULS <= yield / gamma_M0 = 275 / 1.0 = 275 MPa; (R2) weld fillet stress <= f_u / (beta_w * gamma_M2) with beta_w = 0.85 for S275 and gamma_M2 = 1.25, giving allowable fillet weld normal stress 430 / (0.85 * 1.25) = 404 MPa; shear in weld throat <= f_u / (sqrt(3) * beta_w * gamma_M2) = 233 MPa; (R3) tip deflection at camera attach point under LC4 SLS <= L/250 = 200/250 = 0.8 mm (EN 1993-1-1 serviceability default for cantilever); (R4) U-bolt clamp friction + form lock must be sufficient to prevent rotation of bracket on pole at LC2 applied moment = 150 * 0.1 m = 15 N*m, given two M12 class 8.8 U-bolts at 60 N*m tightening torque and friction coefficient 0.3 on galvanized steel (preload ~= 25 kN per U-bolt, rotation capacity ~= 2 x 25 kN x 0.3 x 0.038 m arm = 570 N*m >> 15 N*m required); (R5) galvanized coating thickness >= 85 um per EN ISO 1461; (R6) mass <= 4 kg (tender-typical material cost envelope). Deliverables: STEP AP242 + EN ISO 128-compliant 2D drawing; weld schedule per EN ISO 2553; galvanizing specification per EN ISO 1461; FEA report with per-case stresses and deflections.
short_prompt:
Design a machined and welded carbon-steel bracket for a roadside CCTV/lighting mast support per a representative European infrastructure tender: mount a 30 kg CCTV head + housing on a 6 m pole, survive EN 1991-1-4 Eurocode wind loads, EN 1990 ULS + SLS combinations, and EN 1090-2 execution class EXC2 fabrication quality.

Envelope: 300 x 200 x 120 mm. Interfaces: pole-side 360-degree clamp onto a 76 mm OD pole with two M12 class 8.8 U-bolts; camera-side M10 pattern (4 bolts) on 120 x 80 mm.

Material: S275JR per EN 10025-2. Corrosion protection: hot-dip galvanized per EN ISO 1461, coating >= 85 um.

Load cases per EN 1991-1-4 + EN 1993-1-1.
- LC1 permanent load: 30 kg = 294 N down.
- LC2 wind load: Category II terrain, v_b = 27 m/s, q_p(z) = 0.75 kN/m^2 at 6 m, c_f = 1.0 on 0.2 m^2 frontal area = 150 N horizontal, plus ~30 N on bracket.
- LC3 ULS combo 1.35*G + 1.5*Q: resultant 667 N.
- LC4 SLS combo 1.0*G + 1.0*Q for deflection.
- LC5 hailstone impact 20 mm dia at 30 m/s (EN 61730-2 Class 2) = 5 J.

Pass criteria include EN 1993-1-1 ULS stress <= 275 MPa (gamma_M0 = 1.0); weld limits with beta_w = 0.85 and gamma_M2 = 1.25; SLS deflection <= L/250 = 0.8 mm; mass <= 4 kg.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: EN 1991-1-4 peak velocity pressure q_p(z) is a closed-form formula with tabulated terrain coefficients.
EN 1993-1-8 fillet weld directional method is closed-form.

prompt.title: S275JR galvanized CCTV/lighting mast support bracket per EN 1993 + European infrastructure tender
prompt.brief: Design a 300x200x120 mm machined+welded S275JR bracket clamping to a 76 mm pole and holding a 30 kg CCTV at 6 m height, per EN 1991-1-4 wind + EN 1993-1-1 ULS/SLS.

boundary_conditions.camera_attach: load applied at CG of camera

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: L/250 with L = 200 mm cantilever per EN 1993-1-1 serviceability
clamp torque capacity / wind moment demand >= 10 (tenderous safety)
EN ISO 1461 minimum for > 6 mm thick steel

analysis_types: linear static ULS + SLS + EN 1993-1-8 weld check

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Static Eurocode design governs; aeroelastic vortex shedding is out of scope for this bracket class.

notes.numeric_source: EN 1993-1-1 and EN 1991-1-4 published coefficients; S275JR per EN 10025-2. v_b=27 m/s is a representative European coastal value, not a specific tender number.
